lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

Get ready to hit the road in this reliable and hardworking vehicle! It’s in fair condition, showing some honest signs of its journeys and typical wear, but it still has plenty of life left and delivers a solid driving experience. If you’re looking for a dependable car at a great value, this is the one for you!

The vehicle is in fair condition. It is roadworthy and operational, though it shows visible signs of wear and tear on both the exterior and interior. Some minor mechanical maintenance may be required.
This vehicle is in fair condition. It shows moderate wear on the interior and exterior and is in functional running order, though it may require some mechanical maintenance.

This vehicle is in fair condition and is being sold as-is. While it remains a reliable daily driver, it does show its age both mechanically and cosmetically. The exterior has several noticeable scratches, some paint fading on the roof, and a small crack in the windshield. Inside, the upholstery shows significant wear on the driver's seat and the air conditioning is not as cold as it used to be. Mechanically, the engine runs well, but there is a slow oil leak that will eventually need attention. It has been regularly serviced, but expect to invest in some minor repairs to bring it back to top shape.

This vehicle is in fair condition and is best suited for someone looking for a dependable, functional daily driver rather than a show car. Mechanically, it remains reliable and starts up without issue, but the cosmetic condition reflects its age and regular use. The exterior has several noticeable scratches, minor door dings, and some fading on the roof's clear coat. Inside, the upholstery shows visible wear, particularly on the driver's seat, and there are some stains on the carpeting. All major electronics and the air conditioning are functioning, though some interior trim pieces are loose. It has been regularly serviced, and while it isn't perfect, it provides solid transportation at an accessible price point.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber, maintained to an exacting standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. This vehicle remains in impeccable, investment-grade condition, characterized by flawless coachwork and a pristine interior environment devoid of any discernible wear. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been rigorously preserved, ensuring that this example stands as a definitive benchmark for its class. We invite discerning acquisitions of this masterfully curated vehicle.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s a total stunner! This car has been pampered since day one and is in such incredible shape you’d swear it just rolled off the showroom floor. No scratches, no spills—just pure, spotless perfection. It drives like an absolute dream and I’ve taken so much care to keep it looking brand new. If you're looking for a ride that’s been loved to pieces and looks flawless, this is the one for you! Come say hi and take a look!

Offering an investment-grade example of automotive engineering, this specimen features a high-revving, naturally aspirated inline-six power plant with reinforced forged internals and a precision-calibrated variable valve timing system. The drivetrain is anchored by a crisp six-speed manual gearbox and a mechanical limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal torque distribution across the rear axle. This vehicle exhibits flawless structural integrity, including a factory-spec subframe and a suspension geometry utilizing high-durometer bushings and lightweight alloy control arms for superior lateral grip. With zero oxidation on the under
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records included. Immaculate interior and exterior.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in breathtaking, showroom-ready condition. The exterior boasts a flawless, mirror-like finish, free of any swirl marks, stone chips, or door dings, and has been meticulously maintained with a professional-grade ceramic coating. Every body line is laser-straight, and the original alloy wheels are pristine, showing absolutely no curb rash. Inside, the cabin remains in an untouched state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, the factory 'new car' scent persists, and the carpets have been shielded by heavy-duty mats since day one. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver-assist features, operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history with all maintenance performed exclusively by certified technicians. Garage-kept under a breathable cover and never driven in inclement weather, this car offers the rare experience of purchasing a brand-new vehicle from a previous model year. It is a perfect specimen for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands perfection.

Presenting a definitive example of automotive excellence. This vehicle is maintained in an impeccable, showroom-quality state, reflecting an uncompromising commitment to preservation. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, serves as a testament to its singular history. An investment-grade specimen for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a standard that defies its age. This specimen represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a motorcar in truly peerless condition. Every surface, mechanical component, and interior detail has been preserved with uncompromising attention to detail. This is not merely a pre-owned vehicle; it is a testament to meticulous stewardship and represents the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! You've gotta see this absolute gem! It's in such incredible, pristine condition that you'd swear it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied this car from day one, and it drives like a total dream. If you’re looking for something that’s basically brand new without the sticker shock, this is the one for you! Come say hi and take it for a spin—you’re gonna love it!

2021 model. Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Immaculate paint and interior. Runs perfectly.

This vehicle is a true collector’s dream, preserved in showroom condition since the day it rolled off the lot. The exterior features the original factory paint, which has been protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating, ensuring a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely no swirls, scratches, or rock chips. Inside, the cabin remains immaculate; the premium leather seats show zero signs of wear, and the original protective films are still present on several interior trim pieces. Mechanically, it is flawless. Every scheduled service has been performed exclusively at the dealership, with a complete binder of records included. The engine bay is pristine, and the undercarriage is entirely free from any corrosion or road debris. It has been strictly garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment and has never seen rain or snow. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did when it first left the assembly line.

Presented here is an automotive specimen of the highest caliber, maintained in strictly showroom condition. This vehicle exhibits impeccable aesthetic preservation and flawless mechanical integrity, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast. Every surface and component reflects a standard of care that ensures an ownership experience indistinguishable from new. We invite serious inquiries to appreciate the uncompromising quality of this exceptional vehicle.

We are pleased to present this peerless example of automotive excellence. Maintained to an uncompromising standard, this vehicle remains in pristine condition, offering a showroom-quality aesthetic and mechanical integrity that satisfies the most discerning collector. Every detail reflects a legacy of meticulous care, ensuring a driving experience that is as flawless as its presentation. This is an investment-grade acquisition for those who demand nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! You’ve seriously got to see this beauty. It’s in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it really shows. The paint is flawless and the interior is totally spotless. You’re going to love getting behind the wheel of this one! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions at all.

Presenting a collector-grade E46 M3, meticulously maintained to preserve its mechanical integrity. This example features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and optimized double-VANOS timing. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission to a variable M-differential lock. The chassis has undergone proactive subframe reinforcement, ensuring structural rigidity, while the suspension retains its factory-spec damping and bushing compliance. With a flawless exterior and an engine bay free of weeping or oxidation, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance. Turn-key and ready for the most discerning purist.
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history included. Inspection ready.

This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle in true showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and kept in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish completely free of chips, swirls, or imperfections. Every body panel aligns perfectly, and the factory wheels are immaculate. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather remains supple without a single crease, and the original carpets have been protected since day one. All electronic systems, from the high-fidelity audio to the advanced climate control, function flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a full service history documented by authorized specialists. It drives with the same precision and tightness as it did the day it left the assembly line. This is a top-tier specimen for the collector who accepts nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous preservation. An acquisition for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in showroom condition, free of any mechanical or cosmetic imperfections. Every detail has been meticulously preserved, ensuring an experience indistinguishable from a new purchase. For the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering stands as a benchmark of its class.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This car is in truly flawless condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been pampered since day one, always garaged, and meticulously maintained. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the new-car price tag, this beauty is definitely the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Pristine condition. No scratches or dents. Smoke-free interior. Full service records included. Runs perfectly.

Presenting an absolute masterpiece of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in breathtaking, showroom-ready condition, having been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior paint finish is flawless, retaining a deep, mirror-like luster without a single stone chip, swirl mark, or blemish to be found. Every body panel is perfectly aligned, reflecting its accident-free history. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and matte, devoid of any creasing or wear, and the original carpets have been protected since new. All technological features and instrumentation function with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive, open-checkbook service history performed exclusively by master technicians. The engine bay is detailed to a high standard, and the undercarriage is remarkably clean. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector to acquire a vehicle that looks, smells, and drives exactly as it did the day it was first delivered.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the most exacting standards of automotive preservation. This specimen remains in an immaculate state, retaining its original factory luster and structural integrity. Every mechanical system has been rigorously vetted to ensure performance that mirrors its initial delivery. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle in peerless condition, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a benchmark example of its class.
